programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - The Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Lara says she can foresee the future. Maya does not believe her… and is angry with her meadow's friends who believe in the ladybug's super power. How will Maya change theit minds?

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Ants See Red
programme.desc: Paul and his ants broke Kurt’s dungball. Furious, Kurt decides to replace Paul and his men by red ants, deemed very effective in helping the insects of the meadow. But perhaps the red ants are overzealous…

programme.title: Bugged - Season 1 - Episodes 37-39
programme.desc: Jurassic Puck Between the earth and the sky Dumb luck Follow our hero Murphy in his doomed quest to capture the ultimate prize: a bug called Puck. But, for Murphy, nothing ever works the way it should and he has big competition: Blat Jack, a super bounty hunter. Everything that can go wrong will go wrong! Relive the glory days of burlesque cartoons!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Little Treasure
programme.desc: Maya has custody of a sassy little bee: Pamela. Pamela is determined to participate in the treasure hunt organized by Flip… But Maya does not want that. It is too dangerous. Pamela will disobey… and get in trouble.

programme.title: Car City Universe - Car City: Amber the Ambulance - Christmas Party
programme.desc: Tyler is getting ready to meet his friends for the Christmas Party! But he keeps coughing and his wing mirrors are all red! Amber and Baby Amber are on her way too and sees Tyler looking poorly. They tell him that he needs to go to the hospital!

programme.title: Molang - Season 1 - Episodes 15-21
programme.desc: The Parcel The Butterfly The Surprise The Forest The Pumpkin The Armchair Stage Fright Molang is an affectionate, humorous look at the relationship between an eccentric, joyful, and enthusiastic rabbit, and a shy, discreet, and emotional little chick. The series explores Molang and Piu Piu’s everyday life with warmth and humor.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Treasure for the Ants
programme.desc: Maya and Willy find out that the ants discovered a treasure: sugar. They refuse to share this treasure with the other insects in the meadow, who would like to have a share. Soon, a big fight arose between Paul and Kurt…

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Honeymunch
programme.desc: A thief steals honey pots in the hive. Maya discovers that the thief is Max. He does it under the threat of a strange monster: the Honeymunch. Maya investigates to clarify the matter.

programme.title: Car City Universe - Car City: Amber the Ambulance - Old Herbie
programme.desc: Amber and Baby Amber are on their way home from the shop when they bump into Henrie. He has measles (big red spots), but because of his old-fashioned nature, he hasn’t been to the hospital to get medicine.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Flip Save the Queen
programme.desc: The wasps have a new secret weapon: a strange seed that makes bees and others crazy. Thanks to that seed, they kidnap the Queen and ask for a ransom. Maya, Willy and Flip must save the Queen!

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Episodes 10-12
programme.desc: Louie, Draw Me a Mouse Louie, Draw Me a Crane Louie, Draw Me a Submarine Have you ever dreamed of exploring an island or travelling to the moon? programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - First Day in the Meadows
programme.desc: Grandfather has asked Peter, who he calls “Goat General”, to take Heidi with him for the day. Peter is not happy about this decision but doesn’t have much of a choice. So Heidi spends her first day in the mountains with Peter, who is still not talking to her, not very happy at having to take care of the “town girl”.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Cool in the Cooler
programme.desc: It is very hot in the meadow. Maya and her friends discover that there is a cool place in the hive: the jail. They manage to be put in jail by Beeswax. But soon all the bees want to go there too. This information comes to the ears of wasps… who see the opportunity to plunder the hive.

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Episodes 13-15

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Blue Tit
programme.desc: The injured blue tit landed in front of the entrance of the anthill. All the ants, except for Paul, and a large part of the meadow dwellers are now stuck inside. Since Beeswax is not Willyng to send the bee guards to help, Maya, Willy and Paul decide to solve the problem themselves...

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Love Struck
programme.desc: While the Queen welcomes insects of the meadow, Kurt receives a thunderbolt and suddenly falls in love with the monarch. It's very annoying as Kurt pursues the Queen… and ends up in prison. Maya wants to help him regain his senses.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Lara’s Secret Love
programme.desc: Lara announced to her friends in the meadow that she has a mysterious lover who sends her anonymous love letters. What a deal! Maya wants to help the ladybug to find out who the secret writer is…

programme.title: Bugged - Season 1 - Episodes 46-48
programme.desc: Reward money APA to the rescue Home remedies Follow our hero Murphy in his doomed quest to capture the ultimate prize: a bug called Puck. But, for Murphy, nothing ever works the way it should and he has big competition: Blat Jack, a super bounty hunter. Everything that can go wrong will go wrong! Relive the glory days of burlesque cartoons!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Question of Confidence
programme.desc: Willy is depressed: his last gradebook is very bad. Maya tries to cheer him up, letting him win a Rugblé game with the help of their friends. Willy is feels more confident now… and thereby decides to participate in a very difficult challenge - a big race in the meadow. Maya fears to tell him she has lied about his real abilities…

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - A Very Peculiar Mother
programme.desc: Willy falls into a blueberry bush. He’s now purple. Thekla the spider thinks he is a baby spider and decides to raise him in his lair. Maya wants to save his friend from the dangerous spider…

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - No Harmony for Beewax
programme.desc: Beeswax thinks that the easn of perfect organisation of ants is their singing! So, he steals their song. It's a copyright for ever: the ants can't sing that song anymore! The ants are depressed (furthermore it’s a special day: they have to parade in the meadow). How will they now patrol without their source of rhythm and above all without the motivation of this song ? Maya will help them!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Phobia
programme.desc: Kurt can no longer push his dung ball: it frightens him. As soon as he faces his ball, he starts to sweat, his knees tremble and he collapses howling. Maya wants to help the dung beetle to overcome his phobia…

programme.title: Molang - Season 1 - Episodes 22-28
programme.desc: The Cowboys The Bandanna The Penguin The Car The Hiccup The Mountain Bloom A Restless Night Molang is an affectionate, humorous look at the relationship between an eccentric, joyful, and enthusiastic rabbit, and a shy, discreet, and emotional little chick. The series explores Molang and Piu Piu’s everyday life with warmth and humor.

Do you yearn to race cars or talk to friendly bears? No problem! Everything is possible with Louie! With his and Yoko´s help, you´ll learn how to draw while having fun!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - In the Ranks
programme.desc: Maya is no longer allowed to live as a free bee in the meadow. She should move back into the hive and do her job there like an ordinary bee worker. But that's no life for Maya. That's why she does everything to prove to Beeswax and the Queen that her life out in the meadow is much more useful for the beehive than the boring "house work".

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - Beware of the Wolf
programme.desc: A she-wolf wanders in the village and almost attacks Sweetheart, Theresa’s goat. Mr Keller, Theresa’s father, organises a hunt in the woods with the blacksmith. The teacher, who thinks, instead of killing the wolf, they should find out why she’s there in the first place, goes with them. In the meantime, Heidi finds a cub in the woods.

programme.title: Pick n' Mix
programme.desc: A time machine in an antique shop and what's hiding under the bed? Plus much more in this bumper collection of short films.

programme.title: Celebrity Mix
programme.desc: Joel Murray stars in The Listing Agent and Kate Dickie stars in The Operator, just two of the famous faces starring in this collection of short films.

programme.title: Award Winning Drama
programme.desc: Oscar winning short The Neighbours' Window and a young deaf boy loses himself in music in these award winning drama films.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A counselor takes his first call at a crisis centre and a ice rink employee grows increasingly nervous about an abandoned rucksack in this collection of short action thrillers.

programme.title: Into the Abyss
programme.desc: A spaceship hovers over earth with an unknown purpose and an obsessive mathematician feature in this collection of science fiction short films.

programme.title: Night Terrors
programme.desc: A woman has a terrifying encounter online and two decapitated heads must work together - just two of the stories in this chilling collection of horror short films.

programme.title: Late Night Animation
programme.desc: Dolly and Silvio are in love... forever. Plus an animated film noir and more in these late night adult animations.

programme.title: Discover True Stories
programme.desc: A girl learns to skateboard in rural India and an instagram photographer recounts the image that inspired his passion in this collection of short documentaries.

programme.title: Ugly Laugh Adult Comedy
programme.desc: A man with a broken heart tries to relive his failed relationship by hiring a young actress to play his ex-girlfriend. and an actor has a peculiar first day on set, plus much more in these short comedies.

programme.title: All Roads Lead To Rome
programme.desc: A timeless and moving romantic comedy. Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who tries desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Traveller’s Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. When physics genius Stillman is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie, he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan sets off to right every wrong.

programme.title: Kids In Love
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a bohemian London, Kids in Love offers a new take on the traditional coming of age story. Starring: Will Poulter, Jamie Blackley, Geraldine Somerville, Cara Delevingne

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Ramen Girl
programme.desc: An American woman is stranded in Tokyo after breaking up with her boyfriend. Searching for direction in life, she trains to be a ramen chef under a tyrannical Japanese master.

programme.title: Broken English
programme.desc: Nora is in her thirties, alone with job she's outgrown and a mother who constantly reminds her of it all. But after a series of disastrous dates, she unexpectedly meets Julien, a quirky Frenchman who opens her eyes to a lot more than love.

programme.title: Family Ties - They say you can't choose your family.
programme.desc: They say you can't choose your family. A collection of short movies that focus on family relationships.

programme.title: Animation - Artistic Animated movies in a range of forms.
programme.desc: Creative and artistic stories brought to life with pens, paints, plasticine and all other art forms.

programme.title: Coming of Age - Don't Grow Up! It's a Trap!
programme.desc: Coming of Age stories focusing on the trials and tribulations of Growing Up. And the joys too - of course. Don’t grow up! It’s a trap!

programme.title: Drama - Powerful stories that will stay with you.
programme.desc: Grab a box of tissues and enjoy these Powerful stories that will stay with you.

programme.title: Drama - Powerful stories that will stay with you.
programme.desc: Grab a box of tissues and enjoy these Powerful stories that will stay with you.

programme.title: Animation - Artistic Animated movies in a range of forms.
programme.desc: Creative and artistic stories brought to life with pens, paints, plasticine and all other art forms.

programme.title: Love - Stories of love that will tug at your heartstrings.
programme.desc: Stories of lovers falling head over heels. Stories of betrayal, broken hearts and lost loves. Love in all its forms.

programme.title: Hit Pix - Award Winning Short Films
programme.desc: Films that have come out on top at the Festivals. Often Star Studded. Always brilliant.

programme.title: Hit Pix - Award Winning Short Films
programme.desc: Films that have come out on top at the Festivals. Often Star Studded. Always brilliant.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism, whose conditions sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her teenage daughter Kelsey move into a new town so Kelsey can attend a better high school. It’s the start of senior year - meaning new parties to attend and new friends to make. But when Kelsey is abducted while on a date, all Gina’s nightmares come true. Can she save her daughter in time? And can she really trust the people trying to help?

programme.title: In the Blood
programme.desc: Bringing a full-throttle revenge thriller, featuring action superstar and female lead, Gina Carano, and rough and tough, Danny Trejo. When trained fighter Ava’s husband disappears during their Caribbean honeymoon, she uncovers a violent underworld of conspiracy hidden in the island paradise. Now she is set to discover the truth and hunt down the people responsible.

programme.title: Undercover Hooligan
programme.desc: From the creators of Rise of the Footsoldier - a suspended cop is sent undercover to infiltrate a notorious London criminal gang but struggles to keep his cover when he is dragged deeper and deeper into a world of failed operations, people trafficking, murder and extortion.

programme.title: GirlHouse
programme.desc: When sexy turns scary. To make some extra cash while at college, Kylie moves into an infamous house that streams content to an X-rated website. But when a cruel prank on user "Loverboy" turns sour, the deranged fan locates the house and the only thing on his mind is...revenge.

programme.title: Under Capricorn
programme.desc: In 1831, Irishman Charles Adare travels to Australia to start a new life with the help of his cousin who has just been appointed governor. When he arrives he meets powerful landowner and ex-convict Sam Flusky, who wants to do a business deal with him. Whilst attending a dinner party at Flusky's house, Charles meets Flusky's wife Henrietta who he had known as a child back in Ireland. Henrietta is an alcoholic and seems to be on the verge of madness.

programme.title: Late Spring
programme.desc: Noriko is twenty-seven years old and still living with her widowed father. Everybody tries to talk her into marrying, but Noriko wants to stay at home caring for her father.

programme.title: Song Of The Road
programme.desc: Sometime in the early years of the century, a boy, Apu, is born to a poor Brahmin family in a village in Bengal. The father, a poet and priest, cannot earn enough to keep his family going. Apu's sister, Durga, is forever stealing guavas from the neighbour's orchards. All these add to the daily struggles of the mother's life, notwithstanding her constant bickering with old aunt who lives with the family.

programme.title: Behind Him
programme.desc: A.J.s family tells their story of how they handled his deployment to Iraq in 2003.

programme.title: Claudiu And The Fish
programme.desc: Claudiu, 28 year old, works at the fresh fish department of a big supermarket, pitying the live carps crammed into a small, overpacked aquarium. After seeing one of these fish coughing like a human being, Claudiu, seriously troubled by the episode, asks his boss if he can bring a bigger aquarium, where the carps can feel more comfortable. Following a humiliating refusal from the boss, Claudiu decides to take revenge by making a bomb threat call and causing the evacuation of the entire store. But his satisfaction doesn’t last for too long: Claudiu learns that his prank call just sentenced to death all the living fish and thus he’s forced to go back inside the empty store and rescue them.

programme.title: Frame Of Mind
programme.desc: Desperately seeking a new start, NYPD Detective, David Secca (CARL T. EVANS) and his pregnant wife escape the struggles of New York City and return to their hometown in New Jersey. He reluctantly takes a job with the local Police Department. His priorities abruptly change when he stumbles upon a mysterious strip of 8mm film, discovered accidently in an antique jewelry box. Things really heat up as it becomes obvious that he found a key piece of evidence in the Kennedy assassination.

programme.title: Jake Squared
programme.desc: A filmmaker sets out to make a new project in order to figure out how he's screwed up every relationship he's ever had.

programme.title: Whats Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Alpha Dog follows three fateful days when the lives of a group of Southern California teens suddenly dead-ended. The film features a powerful ensemble cast including Sharon Stone, Justin Timberlake, Anton Yelchin and Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: Spring, 1992. Days before the trial on the Rodney King LA riots... Eldon Perry struggles with the racially charged violence erupting around him.

programme.title: 21 Grams
programme.desc: When a horrific accident traumatically binds three people's lives together, events unfold that take them to the heights of passion, the depths of obsession and the promise of revenge. 21 Grams is a bold, multi-layered, extraordinary cinematic experience.

programme.title: Another World
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic future, a biological warfare program gone wrong leaves only four survivors defending themselves from "the infected" - mindless killers. As they struggle to survive and make sense of what is happening, they find another survivor, intent on revealing the truth.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Billy Zane stars as Barabbas--the man whose life was spared because of the crucifixion of Jesus Christ. Based on the Nobel Prize in Literature winning novel by Par Lagerkvist, Barabbas is a story rooted in the Bible which will come to life on REELZ as a four-hour miniseries and tells the ultimate story of redemption. Barabbas was shot on location in Tunisia and is directed by Emmy Award winner Roger Young.

programme.title: The Unseen
programme.desc: A man who abandoned his family now risks everything to find his missing daughter, including exposing the secret that he is becoming invisible.

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: The plot revolves around the 1969 Stonewall Riots, the violent clash that kicked off the gay rights movement in New York City. The drama centers on Danny Winters, who flees to New York, leaving behind his sister. He finds his way to the Stonewall Inn, where he meets Trevor before catching the eye of Ed Murphy, manager of the Stonewall.

programme.title: Haunted 3: Spirits
programme.desc: A continuation of Haunted 2: Appartions. Andrew Robinson the private investigator returns as he looks into the Halloween horror nights phenomenon. On a rural farm in deepest, darkest England he encounters a series of bizarre paranormal events that lead to a mystery being solved with frightening consequences and ultimate finale.

programme.title: Forever Love
programme.desc: A couple's lost love goes full circle between the 50's and the present.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

One of Katarina's girls, Julianna Vejzna - a Romanian national - is being extorted by an Immigration official, Robert Bergen. Mary tries to use this situation to her advantage by exposing Bergen and using him as part of her intelligence network. In catching Bergen in this extortion, Kiniski places an audio and video surveillance in Julianna's apartment. However, getting Bergen to cough up useful information is difficult for Julianna to achieve. Mary is asked by the Defense Department to intervene in an exposé on faulty military vehicles being written by journalist ...

programme.title: Secret Millionaire
programme.desc: A very rich father wants to build on a local park. His only son fall in love with cute protester, but she doesn't know who his father is.

programme.title: His Secret Past
programme.desc: Popular crime novelist, Jennifer Becker lives a lavish life in a small coastal town in California with her daughter, Lily. One day, while out for a run, Lily is attacked--but then rescued by a mysterious stranger named Mick.

programme.title: Sportswoman: Saina Newhal
programme.desc: US Soccer player Alex Morgan has a voice and she is not afraid to use it and badminton’s Saina Newhal achieved a plethora of ‘firsts’ for India. Determined mountain biker Emily Batty showed up to London 2012 bruised and battered, and it’s not just Katie Ledecky winning medals in the pool for the USA. Finally, gymnast Ágnes Keleti paved the way for the future.

Jimmy and Mary are each facing major crises, both surrounding one individual, Dick Royden. Jimmy risks being exposed as part of OCU's intel network, but he doesn't know by who. Mary refuses to tell Jimmy who it is. If Jimmy goes down because of it, his entire team goes down with him. He calls upon his inner circle, specifically Desjardins and Coombs, to find out who, and will pay any cost for the information and the ultimate disposal of that person. He also stashes a major amount of cash just as a precautionary measure. While his inner circle deals with this issue, ...

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: Death Watch
programme.desc: A terrorist plants several bombs throughout the city of Colombo, Sri Lanka and threatens to detonate them unless prisoners are released.

programme.title: Love, Wedding, Marriage
programme.desc: Handsome, romantic, sexy gentile Charlie enjoys his honeymoon with liberal-Jewish marriage counselor Ava. It's cut short when her parents Bradley and Betty, who always seemed the perfect couple, suddenly border on divorce over an old affair and poorly matched expectations. Worse, in turn they invite themselves to move in and drive the newly-weds crazy. Ethics prevent Ava from taking them on as clients and the colleagues she refers to prove hopelessly inept. Meanwhile Charlie's impulsive buddy Gerber, the eternal bachelor party animal, has married Polish green-card-chaser Kasia.

programme.title: The Assassination
programme.desc: At a Catholic high school, a sophomore newspaper reporter investigates a case of stolen SAT exams. He thinks he's nailed the suspect and managed to get the popular girl when he realises a larger conspiracy is afoot.

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A dramatization of Lori Petty's teenage years spent in small town Iowa.

programme.title: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: Six unfamiliar students are left locked alone inside their High School during a winter storm. As conditions worsen, wills are tested, friendships are created, and secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Hostile Advances: The Kerry Ellison Story
programme.desc: Kerry Ellison is sexually harassed at work. Her only option left is court. Will she win?

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Two veterans of the Bosnian War find their friendship tested when one of them reveals their true intentions.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: As they're held for ransom, a husband and wife's predicament grows more dire amid the discovery of betrayal.

programme.title: A Killer Walks Amongst Us
programme.desc: After the murder of a teen girl, a retired FBI agent is recruited by the local police to help solve the case.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Two veterans of the Bosnian War find their friendship tested when one of them reveals their true intentions.

programme.title: American Sophmore
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: 6 Nonsmokers
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: FSK16

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Cord McNally searches for the traitor whose betrayal caused the defeat of McNally’s unit and the loss of a close friend.

programme.title: Subject 36
programme.desc: A reclusive loner, Gwen has an obsession with stalking and studying strangers, always at a distance. When one of her subjects enters her life in an unexpected way it may change her life in ways she could never antipicpate.

programme.title: The Hardest Thing
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion. Mads Mikkelsen gives a tour de force performance as a pilot whose plane has crashed in a remote corner of the Arctic. Stranded in the wilderness he uses his ingenuity to survive. When about to receive his long-awaited rescue, an explosive accident means his opportunity is lost and the dire situation further complicated. The tragic turn of events, involving another crash survivor forces the pilot to make a perilous choice between the relative safety of his camp and a deadly trek into the unknown.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she’s up for the top job at the hospital. For a well-deserved vacation, Jessica books a stay at a resort in Fiji so she and her daughter can disconnect and bond. During her stay, Jessica strikes up a friendship with Will, the charming owner of the resort. As Jessica and Will spend more time together, she begins to relax and starts to wonder if this island paradise can give her the life – and love – she’s always hoped for.

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: On the eve of World War I, Zurich and Vienna are the setting for a dark tale of sexual and intellectual discovery. Drawn from true-life events, A DANGEROUS METHOD takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them. Into the mix comes Otto Gross, a debauched patient who is determined to push the boundaries.

programme.title: Two Lovers
programme.desc: Leonard is an attractive but troubled young man living with his parents in suburban Brooklyn when two women enter his life. The lovely but ordinary daughter of his father’s new business partner and his beautiful but volatile neighbour trapped in a destructive affair, whose passion helps to reignite his lust for life.

programme.title: 12 and Holding
programme.desc: After his twin brother is accidentally killed by vengeful bullies, a 12-year old boy and his friends face the harsh realities of death, teenage hormones, and family dysfunction.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she’s elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn’t her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: The Pirate
programme.desc: The Pirate is the epic true story of Ioannis Varvakis, a humble Greek pirate who, with the help of Catherine The Great, went on to become an international caviar millionaire but ended his days as an inmate on a remote prison island. This epic tale moves from the Greek islands, to the court of the Russian Queen, and then back to a country torn apart by revolution and civil war. This is a story of one man s journey from pirate to nobleman amid war and a fight for independence.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: From the directors of Daybreakers, PREDESTINATION chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travel journeys designed to stop crimes before they are committed. Now, on his final assignment, he must pursue the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Action legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Michael Chiklis ("The Shield") light up this edge of your seat thriller. Crime boss Rex (Willis) hires Frank (Chiklis) and his crew to steal a priceless jewel stash—but the job goes wrong when someone tips off the cops. After Frank suffers a blow to the head, he wakes up to find the jewels gone and no memory of his attacker. Now Frank must confront his team members one by one to find the traitor—before Rex covers his tracks by having Frank murdered.

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her teenage daughter Kelsey move into a new town so Kelsey can attend a better high school. It’s the start of senior year - meaning new parties to attend and new friends to make. But when Kelsey is abducted while on a date, all Gina’s nightmares come true. Can she save her daughter in time? And can she really trust the people trying to help?

programme.title: Gun Shy
programme.desc: The story follows Turk Henry a mega platinum rock star who's married to a supermodel and rich beyond his wildest dreams. Whilst on holiday, his wife is mysteriously abducted by a group of renegade, ship-less pirates. With little assistance from local authorities Turk is forced to embark on a mission to rescue his wife using life skills better suited to playing bass, playing the field, and partying. He is forced to navigate through deadly jungles and take on ruthless bandits in this truly hilarious, action-packed romp. From director Simon West, writer Toby Davies and starring Olga Kurylenko, Ben Cura, Aisling Loftus and Antonio Banderas
